header.name: Return By Death - Behavior Pack
header.description: Re:Zero-inspired Return By Death mechanic for Bedrock Edition (including Pocket Edition). v1.2.5 HOTFIX: Fixes v1.2.4 regression - rolled back risky sound_definitions.json values (max_distance:10000 + volume:4.0 caused RP load failure on some Bedrock versions, breaking the whole script). Now uses safe volume 1.0 (the OGG itself is already 6x louder from v1.2.4). All playSound calls wrapped in try/catch so sound issues never break death/respawn logic.
